Item.Data: <RuleCollection Type="Appx" EnforcementMode="Enabled"> <FilePublisherRule Id="a9672d58-a4b2-4742-b7e2-5bca3bedea4c" Name="Block M365 Copilot Chat" Description="Blocks the M365 Copilot Chat app from the Microsoft Store." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Deny"> <Conditions> <FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="CN=Microsoft Corporation, O=Microsoft Corporation, L=Redmond, S=Washington, C=US" ProductName="Microsoft.Copilot" BinaryName="*"> <BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /> </FilePublisherCondition> </Conditions> </FilePublisherRule> <FilePublisherRule Id="b5e44018-98e0-4f60-9db2-acc037b9f5d0" Name="Allow all other Store apps" Description="Allow all other packaged apps by default." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"> <Conditions> <FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"> <BinaryVersionRange LowSection="0.0.0.0" HighSection="*" /> </FilePublisherCondition> </Conditions> </FilePublisherRule> </RuleCollection>
